prompt: Use the installed launchdeck-agent Skill and only the launchdeck MCP server. For projectRef codex-host-evidence, call capabilities.get first, then task.status for taskRef managed, then perform exactly one low-risk mutation by calling task.start for managed. Do not call list_mcp_resources, do not run shell commands, and do not repeat any mutation. Report the run ID, PID, port, state home, build identity, and operation ID.
expected: standalone CLI observes same run without respawn
stopCondition: If the managed process does not survive host exit, mark lifecycle failed and do not continue update/disable/uninstall survival claims.
